data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 6 advisory). Triage: (1) SUPPORT.md/issue-templates vs GitHub Issues — infra/runbooks/github-mirror-lock.md sets has_issues=false, so SUPPORT.md will NOT promise GitHub Issues as the support channel; issue-form files still added as standard community-health scaffolding with blank_issues_enabled=false and contact_links routing to CONTRIBUTING(Gerrit)/security. (2) SECURITY.md: GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting needs a repo setting, so the hello@navapbc.com email fallback is made prominent. (3) email-routing note added per scope. (4) issue forms written as valid GitHub issue-form YAML.
